title: Freeze T551 validator boundary
description: Define the structure-preserving ProbabilityEdit validator boundary: it runs after payload normalization and before command/order mutation, and it owns only normalized market/context/base-marginal preservation checks rather than generic payload validation or solvency.

title: Implement core structure-preserving validator
description: Implement the validator logic that checks target outcome membership, normalized context references, base-marginal completeness, finite numeric values, non-negative probabilities, unit-sum mass, and safe renormalization for binary and multi-outcome edits, returning 400 invalid_structure_preserving_edit on violations.

title: Wire validator to unconditional and conditional base slices
description: Resolve the correct base marginals from current market state or an existing CONDITIONAL_MARGINALS slice via normalized context keys, then invoke the validator from ProbabilityEdit payload normalization before any command, order, or event side effects.

title: Cover validator and normalization edge cases
description: Add direct tests for accepted binary and three-outcome edits plus malformed marginals, missing or extra outcome mass, non-unit totals, invalid context references, and malformed conditional slices reused during payload normalization.

title: Cover HTTP surfacing of validator failures
description: Add route-level tests proving POST /v1/markets/{id}/orders/probability-edit surfaces 400 invalid_structure_preserving_edit for malformed market state or malformed existing conditional slices and leaves write-side state untouched.

title: Protect accepted edits with inference invariants
description: Keep brute-force tiny-net invariant coverage around accepted unconditional and contextual ProbabilityEdit requests so the validator does not over-reject valid edits and accepted updates still match the expected renormalized marginals.
